selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including ... pencil/marker holders ... storage bins and paper trays"
selections.style_notes: Teacher workstation; organized, work-ready; keep to 4–6 small items, leave writing space clear.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: pencil/marker holder, paper tray(s). Optional: lesson planner/gradebook, stapler, sticky notes, coffee mug, laptop

selections.prompt_constraints: Use separate physical objects for the colored marker, board marker, and whiteboard eraser; keep them low and stable on the cabinet support.
selections.style_notes: Top surface only; low-profile and stable; 1–3 items with clear edges.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: extra paper tray(s), one separate colored classroom marker, one dry-erase board marker, and one whiteboard eraser. Optional: stack of worksheets, tissue box

selections.prompt_constraints: Preserve labeled storage, textbooks, separate folder/worksheet, and two backpacks. Do not use open bins, filled-container composites, caddies, or loose glue/scissors in this cubby. Every base must be centered fully inside a compartment with no leaning, hanging, or overhang.
selections.style_notes: Use broad-base lidded totes and flat book/paper stacks in separate cubbies; keep backpacks in the lower row and preserve empty space and aisle access.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: lidded low-profile labeled storage totes with broad flat bases; textbooks in short flat stacks; one folder and one separate worksheet laid flat; two backpacks fully supported inside lower cubbies. Optional: one closed rectangular pencil box

selections.prompt_constraints: Use separate compact notebook, eraser, and water bottle objects with clear support.
selections.style_notes: Student surface; minimal set, 2–4 items; no clutter.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: notebook, pencil eraser, water bottle. Optional: worksheet

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including textbooks, notebooks ... erasers/rulers"
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: textbook, notebook, ruler. Optional: pencil case

selections.prompt_constraints: Prompt: "Add believable school-use details including ... folders/worksheets ... water bottles"
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: folder/worksheets. Optional: pencil/eraser, water bottle

selections.prompt_constraints: This flat desk is the required glue/scissors evidence target rerouted from the cubby. Use separate visible objects with full broad contact, clear gaps, and generous distance from every desk edge.
selections.style_notes: Minimal safe-looking craft set: notebook flat, scissors closed and flat, capped glue horizontal, with the writing area and chair approach clear.
selections.suggested_items: REQUIRED: one closed notebook, one capped glue stick laid horizontally, and one pair of closed school scissors laid flat. Optional: one pencil
